description: E2E test case designs for opencode-config crate - Configuration management

test_cases.title: Config load from JSON file
test_cases.description: Test loading config from JSON/JSONC file

test_cases.title: Config deep merge on patch
test_cases.description: Test partial config update does deep merge
steps: Verify port updated, other server fields preserved

test_cases.title: Keychain secret resolution
test_cases.description: Test keychain references resolved at load time
steps: Verify reference resolved to actual value
Verify original config file not modified

test_cases.title: Config variable expansion
test_cases.description: Test ${VAR} and ~ expansion in config values

test_cases.title: Config path resolution
test_cases.description: Test Config::config_path() returns correct path
steps: Verify path is in config directory

test_cases.title: Directory scanner for tools
test_cases.description: Test DirectoryScanner finds tools in directories

test_cases.title: Remote config cache
test_cases.description: Test remote config fetching and caching
steps: Verify cache used on subsequent loads

test_cases.title: JSONC comment parsing
test_cases.description: Test JSONC files with comments parse correctly

test_cases.title: Config malformed JSONC recovery
test_cases.description: CRITICAL: Config must handle malformed JSONC gracefully without crashing
test_cases.risk_addressed: Config load crash on invalid file
steps: Write each malformed content to config.jsonc
Verify error is descriptive (not generic panic)
expected_outcomes: Error message indicates parse failure with line/column
Original file unchanged or backed up
post_checks: Error logged with file path and reason

test_cases.title: Config circular variable reference detection
test_cases.description: CRITICAL: Config must detect and reject circular variable references to prevent infinite loop
test_cases.risk_addressed: Infinite loop or stack overflow during config expansion
steps: Verify error returned (not hang or crash)
expected_outcomes: Config returns error with message mentioning 'circular' or 'cycle'
Process does not hang (timeout after N iterations)
Error identifies the cycle path (e.g., 'A -> B -> A')
post_checks: Max recursion depth bounded (stack overflow prevented)

test_cases.title: Config missing required environment variables
test_cases.description: Config must handle missing env vars with clear error, not silent empty values
test_cases.risk_addressed: Silent failure or empty values when required env vars missing
steps: Ensure OPENCODE_API_KEY is not in environment
Create config with required env var reference
Verify error message indicates missing var
expected_outcomes: Required missing var: error returned (not empty string)
Error identifies the missing variable name
Optional missing var: empty string or fallback used

test_cases.title: Config schema validation - unknown fields
test_cases.description: Config must validate schema and reject unknown fields if configured to
test_cases.risk_addressed: Typo in config field name silently ignored
test_cases.preconditions: Config schema defined with known fields
steps: Load config with strict validation enabled
Verify error or warning for unknown fields
expected_outcomes: Unknown fields cause error OR warning (configurable)
Error message suggests correct field name if close match

test_cases.title: Config deep merge type conflict
test_cases.description: Patch with wrong type for nested field must be rejected or handled
test_cases.risk_addressed: Type mismatch during deep merge corrupts config
expected_outcomes: Type mismatch returns error OR casts safely
No silent type coercion that could cause bugs

test_cases.title: Config array merge behavior
test_cases.description: Deep merge of arrays must be well-defined (replace vs append)
test_cases.risk_addressed: Array merge semantics unclear causing unexpected behavior

test_cases.title: Config hot-reload when file changes on disk
test_cases.description: CRITICAL: Config should detect file changes and reload without restart
test_cases.risk_addressed: Config changes require full server restart
test_cases.preconditions: Server running with config loaded from file
steps: Modify config.json (change logLevel from info to debug)
Trigger config reload (watch event or API call)
Verify new config values are used
expected_outcomes: New values take effect for new operations
In-flight operations continue with old config
post_checks: No file descriptor leaks from file watch

test_cases.title: Config reload atomicity - no partial state
test_cases.description: Config reload must be atomic - no intermediate partial state visible
test_cases.risk_addressed: Partial config state visible during reload
steps: Write new config with valid JSON
Verify no observer sees partial config during write
expected_outcomes: Atomic swap: old config replaced by new config
No moment where config is partially loaded
If new config invalid, old config remains

test_cases.title: Config keychain unavailable handling
test_cases.description: Config must handle keychain inaccessibility gracefully
test_cases.risk_addressed: Config load fails entirely when keychain unavailable
steps: Simulate keychain unavailable (permission denied, timeout, missing)
expected_outcomes: Missing key: error identifies the key
Unavailable keychain: error indicates keychain unavailable
post_checks: Process fails fast if key required

test_cases.title: Config file permission validation
test_cases.description: Config must validate file permissions (not world-readable)
test_cases.risk_addressed: Sensitive config exposed via world-readable file
test_cases.preconditions: Config file created with restrictive perms
steps: Create config file with each permission set
Verify warning for overly permissive files

test_cases.title: Variable expansion with nested quotes
test_cases.description: Variable expansion must handle quotes within values correctly
steps: Load config with various quote patterns
expected_outcomes: No extra quotes added around expanded value

test_cases.title: Config variable default values
test_cases.description: Config should support default values for missing variables
steps: For each test case, set or unset env var, load config
expected_outcomes: Actual value used when var set
